headline: ₹0-50 Cr at risk (share price volatility only) at stake — YES BANK appoints Vinay M Tonse as new MD & CEO, signaling governance continuity amid sector competition
what_matters: BRSR, GRI, COSO ERM frameworks triggered; no new regulatory deadlines or penalties.
No P/E compression or margin erosion; revenue at risk is negligible.
No material impact on cost of capital or bond spreads; FII flows unaffected.
